ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographic_areas" (
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each geographic area */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic area */,
  "parent_geo_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent geographic area (e.g., state ID for a county) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population estimate */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the geographic area in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_areas_parent_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_geo_id") REFERENCES geographic_areas ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* ID of the geographic area the data belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., ACS, Census) */,
  "estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated value of the demographic data */,
  "margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the estimated value */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic data (e.g., population, income, education) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., ACS, Census, administrative records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographic_areas ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original dataset source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., Under 5, 5-9) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_group_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the data belongs to */,
  "estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated value of the demographic data */,
  "margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the estimated value */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic data (e.g., population, income) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., ACS, Census) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex (Male or Female) */,
  "estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated value of the demographic data */,
  "margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the estimated value */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic data (e.g., population, income) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., ACS, Census) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset requested */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the request was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request being shared */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user the data is being shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the data was shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data sharing (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sharing was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., map, chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the visualization was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the comment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES data_visualizations ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
